description_long: This object is an elongated, irregularly shaped potato with a pale, slightly yellowish-tan skin. The surface is matte and covered with subtle blemishes, small eyes, and faint purplish spots, typical of a freshly harvested potato. Its form is slightly curved, with one end more rounded and the other tapering gently. The skin appears thin and somewhat rough, with a few shallow indentations and minor protrusions. The potato stands upright on thin, root-like extensions visible at the base, suggesting it was recently pulled from the soil. Overall, it has a natural, earthy appearance consistent with root vegetables found in grocery stores or markets.
description: A pale, irregularly shaped potato with a matte, slightly rough skin and faint purplish spots, standing upright on thin root-like extensions.
description_view_0: The potato appears elongated and slightly curved, with a visible root at the base and a smooth, rounded top.
description_view_1: This view shows the potato's broadest side, highlighting its rounded, bulbous form and two thin roots at the bottom.
description_view_2: The potato looks narrower and more tapered from this angle, with a single root visible at the base and subtle surface blemishes.
description_view_3: This side reveals a flatter, more irregular surface with two thin roots at the base and a few shallow indentations.
attribute_contextual_placement: piled in a bin or basket with other potatoes
attribute_human_interaction: People typically pick up, inspect, wash, peel, and cut this object before cooking or eating.
